titleStmt.title: SII 34.176: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 176. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Hoysaḷa, Vīra Sōmēśvara, 20st year, Mēsha, sudi 13, Sunday, Hasta = A.D. 1253, April 13, Sunday.

This records a gift of 20,000 kāsu by Tiruññāsambanda-nambi, a merchant of Śivapādaśekhara-puram for offerings to the image of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam-uḍaiya-Nachchiyār that he set up in the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai and also for the expenses of providing meals to pilgrims during midday service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti[śrī sā]rvabhaḷa1kāṇi cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvīrapOcaḷacOmīśvara tEvarkku
yāṇṭu 2 10 meṣanāyaṟṟu purvapakṣatutrayōdaśi yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
Attatunāḷ Irājakempīravaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟunakar nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikka
malai Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkkuc civapāta cēkarapurattu viyāpāri viraiyūr kiḻāṉ pollātapiḷḷai Ēkaṉāyaka
ṉāṉa tiruñāṉacampantanampiyēṉ Innāyaṉārkku Iṟṟaināḷāl tirukkāmakkōṭṭamuṭaiya peri
ya nācciyāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷi vi ṟutiṣṭhaiyum paṇṇuvittuppa
ṇṭaruḷappaṇṇiyinnācciyārkku cakālaisan=tikku san=tikku
luṭaṉākkat tiruvamutari Aṟu nāḻiyum Irāvai san=tikkut tiruvamutari nāṉāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu patiṉaṉpalamu
paruppamutu miḷakamutum Aṭaikkāyamutu yyamutum neyamutu pālamutu taiyiramutukkum tiruviḷakku ne
ykkum tiruccurapikku Orumeyyuḷḷatum cellakkaṭavatākavum Innāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattu Iṟṟai
nāḷāl Intat tiruñāṉacampantampiyēṉ Oṭukkiṉa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 10000 Ikkācu Irupatiṉāyiramum kai
kkoṇṭu Ippaṭi can=tirātittavarai cella kaṭavatākavum Inta mūṉṟu san=tiyum Amutu ceytaruḷi
ṉacōṟṟil Innācciyā
Aṟunāḻiyum Uvaccāḷ Oṉṟukkuc cōṟu nāṉāḻiyum A Iṭu kumpiṭa Ēṟiṉa tēśāntiri mā
hecurarkku Uccisan=tiyilE pāluṭaṉ nāṉāḻiyaricic cOṟu paṭaittu vaḻaṅkavum Itil tirunāyaṟṟukki
ḻamaitōṟum Irunāḻiyaricic cōṟu tiru ṉōṭuvitākap paṭaittu Innāyaṉār tēvaraṭiyāḷ
Uyyā ḷāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira yāṉa cavātavūr naṅkai peṟakkaṭa
ḷākavum Āna ṟukuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Ippaṭi mēṟpaṭi Ippaṭi 1/2 kācu Irupatiṉāyirattukku
Upayamāka cantirātittavarai Ippaṭi cellakkaṭavatāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉēṉ tiruñāṉacampa
nta nampiyēṉ Ikkācu Irupatiṉāyiramum Upayamākak kaikkoṇṭu san=tirātittavarai Ippaṭi celuttuvikkaṭavē
ṉ Ikkōyil Āticaṇṭēcura tēvakaṉmi kōyilkaṇakku m tiruñāṉacampanta nampikku
paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
